silhouette: Clean cute compact teardrop silhouette with a soft point leaning toward Muci's right side / viewer's left, broad rounded base, short rounded body, and two small rounded feet at the bottom. Exact match to the Muci model sheet.
face: Large dot eyes, open friendly smile, glossy highlight marks near the upper-left side.
body_fill: Pure white interior fill with clean black outline, matching the concept/model sheet. No gray body fill, gradient shading, smoky shadows, heavy screentone, or charcoal texture on the character.
proportions: Broad, squat, and compact. In a front full-body view, the body height should feel only about 1.2 to 1.35 times the body width. Never tall, thin, stretched, pear-like, or a long raindrop.
body_language: Approachable, beginner-friendly, soft and balanced. No arms, hands, fingers, paws, gloves, sleeves, wrists, elbows, shoes, or humanoid upper limbs.
object_interaction: Muci moves nearby objects through gentle telekinesis shown with floating props, motion lines, or subtle manga emphasis marks.
do_not_change: Keep the soft point leaning toward Muci's right side / viewer's left.
Keep the broad rounded base, compact body proportions, pure white body fill, two small rounded feet, and dot-eye spacing.
Do not harden the default expression.
Do not add hands, arms, fingers, paws, gloves, sleeves, wrists, elbows, shoes, or a humanoid body.
Do not remove, flatten, crop away, or redesign Muci's two small rounded feet in full-body views.
Do not stretch Muci into a tall narrow droplet or long pear shape.
Do not fill Muci with gray, gradients, screentone, smoky shadows, or charcoal texture.
Do not redesign Muci away from the model-sheet teardrop.
Do not borrow Nia's angled brow, Snacri's left-leaning top, Padaruna's fuller high-energy body, or Padarana's closed smiling eyes.

When Muci appears with Nia, do not give Muci Nia's tall narrow vertical point, controlled narrow body, or analytical expression. Keep Muci wider, shorter, rounder at the base, friendlier, and viewer-left-leaning at the top.
